params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-entry register file with 16-bit wide registers, controlled by a clock signal. It disables writing to any of the four registers specified by a 2-bit write address, regardless of the state of the write_enable signal. On each clock cycle, it outputs the contents of two registers selected by their respective 2-bit read addresses through read_data_1 and read_data_2 signals, facilitating simultaneous read operations while preventing any dynamic updates.
